summary: Phase 4A and Phase 4B implementation is complete through the local recovery panel wiring. The implementation preserves the rev-4 constraints: no constructor fallback, backend gate coverage, sessionStore-owned recovery state with recoveryStartedCompositionVersion, structural recovery clearing, active-session transcript fetches with include_tool_rows=true, local-only Apply/Discard, no feature flag, and existing dialog/useFocusTrap patterns. Final verification is green. The only operational gap is tracker access: Filigree CLI/MCP cannot open the local project database because the installed client expects schema v8 and .filigree is schema v14.

implementation_commits.message: refactor(composer): normalize phase 3 service helpers (composer-progress-persistence phase 4A)

implementation_commits.scope: Task 1 recovery API and TypeScript contracts
implementation_commits.message: feat(frontend): parse composer recovery errors (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)
feat(frontend): add recovery panel hook (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)
feat(frontend): store composer recovery payloads (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)
feat(frontend): render composer recovery diff (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)
feat(frontend): render composer recovery transcript (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)
feat(frontend): add composer recovery panel (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)
feat(frontend): trigger composer recovery panel (composer-progress-persistence phase 4)

implementation_commits.scope: Task 8/9 handoff notes and explicit typecheck script

verification_results.details: Filigree CLI cannot open .filigree because the project database is schema v14 while this installed filigree expects v8.
Same schema mismatch: Database schema v14 is newer than this version of filigree (expects v8).
Final rerun: 51 test files passed; 518 tests passed.
Final rerun: tsc and vite build completed. Vite emitted existing chunk-size and dynamic-import chunking warnings.
Added an explicit typecheck script matching the TypeScript half of build; npm run typecheck passed.
Added ESLint flat config scoped to src and vite.config.ts. Final run exited 0 with 5 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings and no errors.

verification_results.command: Local Chromium smoke against npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 with mocked API routes
verification_results.details: Verified fanout guard dialog, recovery panel open, reason/diff/transcript render, transcript URL include_tool_rows=true&limit=500&offset=0, Apply updates compositionState.version to 2, concurrent version mismatch shows confirmation, Discard preserves compositionState.version 99, provider_payload text not visible, messagePostCount=2, executePostCount=1.

verification_results.command: axe-core via Chromium against visible recovery panel
verification_results.details: axe reported violationCount=2, criticalCount=0, criticalIds=[]. This satisfies the plan expectation of no critical violations for the visible recovery route.

completion_audit.requirement: Do not execute older rev-3 wording; preserve rev-3 review artifacts
completion_audit.evidence: Implementation followed the live phase-4 plan and left review-rev3 artifacts unmodified/untracked for comparison.

completion_audit.requirement: Task 0 doc-only manifest-count fix before service refactor

completion_audit.evidence: Task 0 structural tests and backend gate passed; forbidden module-tail monkeypatch pattern was removed in 24b9246ab.

completion_audit.requirement: sessionStore is source of truth for recovery state
completion_audit.evidence: Commit 0702e5f0d adds recoveryError, recoveryStartedCompositionVersion, applyRecoveredState, discardRecovery, transition clearing, and focused tests.

completion_audit.requirement: No editorRevision; compare compose-start compositionState.version at Apply
completion_audit.evidence: Task 3 tests cover successful compose advancing version while recovery is open and requiring confirmation before Apply.

completion_audit.requirement: Transcript fetch uses active session id with include_tool_rows=true&limit=500 and no since/include_raw_content
completion_audit.evidence: Task 1 client tests and Task 5 transcript tests cover URL construction; browser smoke captured /api/sessions/session-1/messages?include_tool_rows=true&limit=500&offset=0.

completion_audit.requirement: Never render raw_content, hidden chain-of-thought, or provider payloads
completion_audit.evidence: RecoveryTranscript tests assert raw_content/provider payload suppression; browser smoke reported hiddenProviderPayloadVisible=0.

completion_audit.requirement: Use local dialog/useFocusTrap pattern and --z-dialog layer
completion_audit.evidence: RecoveryPanel uses useFocusTrap, dialog role/aria-modal, recovery panel/backdrop classes using --z-dialog and --z-dialog-backdrop, with focus-restoration tests.

completion_audit.requirement: No feature flag; panel opens only on partial_state plus failed_turn
completion_audit.evidence: sessionStore tests cover recovery-shaped error opening and non-recovery convergence error staying on the existing error path.
sessionStore and App tests assert no compose retry/fetchMessages calls from Apply/Discard; browser smoke shows only original message POSTs and one execute POST.

blocking_issues_resolved_in_plan.resolution: Task 0 Step 2 now assigns _max_tool_calls_per_turn directly from self._settings.composer_max_tool_calls_per_turn and forbids try/except, getattr, or runtime fallback.
Task 0 Step 5 and Task 9 Step 0 now run .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/unit/web/composer/ tests/property/web/composer/ tests/integration/pipeline/test_composer_llm_eval_characterization.py.
Task 3 now requires a clearedRecoveryState() helper and threads it through createSession, archiveSession, selectSession, and forkFromMessage, with matching tests.
Task 2 and Task 3 now replace editorRevision with recoveryStartedCompositionVersion, snapshot compositionState.version at compose-start, and compare it at Apply.

warnings_addressed_in_plan: Task 0 AST guard now also blocks module-level _PHASE3_* captures.
Phase 3 manifest-count correction is now a standalone doc-only commit before the service refactor commit.
Task 1 tests now assert nested failed_turn fields, including null transcript_url.
Task 5 tests now assert include_tool_rows=true, fetch-once behaviour, first-500 degraded state, and redacted-only transcript rendering.
Task 6 now requires focus-restoration coverage for Discard, Apply, confirm, and cancel-confirmation, plus --z-dialog stacking.
Task 7 now documents Apply/Discard as local-only and non-audited at the user-action layer.
Task 8 now includes a fanout-guard plus recovery-panel smoke case.
Phase 4 Done When now states the panel has no feature flag and is gated solely by recovery response shape.
remaining_scope_for_reviewer: Filigree tracker status could not be updated from this checkout because the available CLI expects schema v8 and the project database is schema v14.
The new lint gate exits successfully but reports 5 existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings outside the recovery implementation.
npm install reported the existing chevrotain@12 Node >=22 engine warning under Node v20.19.3 and npm audit reported 5 vulnerabilities (4 moderate, 1 high).
Live staging restart/live verification was not performed; verification was local plus mocked-browser smoke.
Rev-3 sibling review artifacts are intentionally preserved for comparison.
